ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hydrological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "day_number" INTEGER /* Day number of the data entry */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall amount in mm */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Snowfall amount in mm */,
  "storage" REAL /* Water storage level in mm */,
  "snowmelt" REAL /* Snowmelt amount in mm */,
  "snowheight" REAL /* Snow height in mm */,
  "q_from_gw" REAL /* Groundwater contribution in mm */,
  "rain_recharge" REAL /* Rain recharge in mm */,
  "snow_recharge" REAL /* Snow recharge in mm */,
  "precip_isotopic_ratio" REAL /* Isotopic ratio of precipitation */,
  "snowpack_isotopic_ratio" REAL /* Isotopic ratio of snowpack */,
  "storage_isotopic_ratio" REAL /* Isotopic ratio of water storage */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research station */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hydrological basin */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "isotopic_ratio_source" TEXT /* Source of isotopic ratio measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES research_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_data_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES hydrological_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the research station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the research station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the research station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the research station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the research station */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the research station */,
  "instruments" TEXT /* List of instruments used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrological_basins" (
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydrological basin */,
  "basin_name" TEXT /* Name of the hydrological basin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hydrological basin */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the hydrological basin */,
  "mean_elevation" REAL /* Mean elevation of the basin */,
  "geology" TEXT /* Geology of the basin */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use in the basin */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the basin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water storage entry */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hydrological basin */,
  "storage_level" REAL /* Water storage level in mm */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the water storage measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure water storage */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_storage_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES hydrological_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snowfall_data" (
  "snowfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snowfall entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research station */,
  "snowfall_amount" REAL /* Snowfall amount in mm */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the snowfall measurement */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Depth of the snow */,
  "snow_density" REAL /* Density of the snow */,
  "snow_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the snow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snowfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowfall_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES research_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_data" (
  "rainfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rainfall entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research station */,
  "rainfall_amount" REAL /* Rainfall amount in mm */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rainfall measurement */,
  "rain_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the rainfall */,
  "rain_duration" REAL /* Duration of the rainfall */,
  "rain_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the rainfall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rainfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES research_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groundwater_data" (
  "gw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each groundwater entry */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hydrological basin */,
  "gw_level" REAL /* Groundwater level in mm */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the groundwater measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure groundwater levels */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the groundwater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groundwater_data_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES hydrological_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES hydrological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
